global_context.scene_description: A cinematic editorial flat-lay or overhead shot on a clean light grey or near-white surface. The composition is split into two columns separated by a thin vertical line. LEFT COLUMN: a stack of FOUR LARGE recognizable monthly subscription service cards arranged vertically with generous spacing between them. The cards are noticeably larger than typical UI cards, each card breathing with whitespace, rendered as clean rectangular cards with the service name and monthly price clearly visible. The cards from top to bottom: (1) 'iPhone PLAN - $120/mo' card with a small iPhone silhouette icon (stylized, generic phone shape), light grey background with subtle Apple-grey palette. (2) 'NETFLIX - $24.99/mo' card with a deep red Netflix-style background and a stylized 'N' shape (generic, suggestive without using exact logo). (3) 'DISNEY+ - $24.99/mo' card with deep navy background and a stylized castle silhouette icon. (4) 'SPOTIFY - $11.99/mo' card with bright Spotify-green background and three stylized arc lines (suggestive of Spotify wave logo). Below the four cards a clean total line: 'TOTAL: $180+/mo' in bold black. The cards should be visually recognizable as those brands by color and minimal iconography but NOT use exact trademarked logos in detail. RIGHT COLUMN: a single clean stand-alone card showing the ASH brand. The ASH card is the same size as ONE subscription card from the left, visually emphasizing that the new AC is just ONE more line in the monthly budget. The ASH card features the actual ASH Cooling & Heating logo at the top (use the provided reference image for the logo), with text below reading 'NEW AC INSTALL', '$150/mo', '0% APR', 'PRICE MATCH'. Use the supplied ASH logo reference for accurate brand mark rendering. A center vertical thin separator line divides the two columns. At the top of the frame, a clean bold sans-serif headline reads: 'YOUR NEW AC COSTS LESS THAN YOUR SUBSCRIPTIONS.' Small italic caption at bottom: 'New AC install. $150/mo financing. 0% APR. Price match. Done in a day.' Lighting: soft even editorial overhead, almost product photography. Mood: cold financial reframe with breathing space. Editorial product still life, NOT documentary photo, NOT cartoon, NOT a flat infographic, NOT a busy spreadsheet.

composition.framing: horizontal frame with two-column comparison, four-card subscription stack on left, single ASH card on right, generous whitespace throughout
composition.focal_point: the visual contrast that the ASH card is similar in size to a single subscription, but the total subs cost MORE than ASH
